# TrustCOA

> COA verification hosting infrastructure for peptide and supplement brands. Publish third-party lab results on your own domain.

## What TrustCOA is

TrustCOA is a hosted Certificate of Analysis (COA) verification platform. Brands upload COA files from their own accredited laboratories; TrustCOA hosts a branded, searchable /verify page on the brand's own domain so customers can verify any batch number instantly.

TrustCOA is a **display and hosting layer only**. It does not perform analytical testing, certify lab credentials, or validate COA authenticity. The accuracy of lab data is the responsibility of the brand displaying it.

## Who it's for

- Peptide brands and supplement companies that have third-party lab testing
- Brands whose buyers search for COAs on Finnrick, Reddit, or other third-party platforms
- Companies that currently share COA PDFs via Google Drive links, DMs, or customer service tickets
- Brands that ship vials and want QR codes on labels that link to verified lot pages

## The problem it solves

Buyers verify research compounds before purchasing. Without a dedicated /verify page on the brand's own domain, that verification happens on platforms the brand doesn't control (Finnrick, Reddit, Trustpilot). TrustCOA brings that trust layer home — on your domain, your branding, your control.

## Core features

- Batch lookup by lot number: searchable database of every lot ever shipped
- Three-lab cross-verification display: HPLC purity, mass-spec identity, and endotoxin from up to three independent labs shown side by side
- QR code per vial: printed on the label, scan to land on that lot's verified page
- White-label: brand colors, logo, custom domain (yourbrand.com/verify)
- Finnrick lot data integration: cross-reference with Finnrick ratings where available
- Transparent failure display: paused lots, re-test statuses, and held batches surfaced openly

## Pricing

- Founder tier: $97/month, first 100 brands
- Includes: unlimited batches, QR code per batch, your domain and colors, no setup fee
- 14-day money-back guarantee
- Founder pricing locked for the lifetime of the active subscription

## Setup

- Median time from discovery call to live page: 18.5 hours
- Free branded mock delivered within 24 hours of booking, before any commitment

## Tagline

"Most won't verify. We do."

## Compliance context

TrustCOA serves brands that sell research-use-only (RUO) compounds. TrustCOA does not make or imply medical claims about any compounds. It sells verification infrastructure — the display layer for lab data the brand already has. Brands are solely responsible for RUO disclaimers on their pages and products.

## Key pages

- Homepage: https://trustcoa.com/
- Live /verify demo: https://trustcoa.com/verify.html
- Privacy policy: https://trustcoa.com/privacy.html
- Terms of service: https://trustcoa.com/terms.html

- 176 lots on file
- 69 compounds
- 3-lab cross-verification standard
